v2:
SUMMARY:
This PR adds a new topic-level config `remote.log.disable.policy` with values "retain" and "delete" as part of KIP-950. The TopicConfig constants and documentation are well-structured, but there are critical missing pieces in LogConfig.java: the config is never registered in the ConfigDef, no default value constant is defined, and no public accessor method exists for the new field. These omissions will cause runtime failures.

POINTS:
- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java:256-323] **CRITICAL BUG: Config not registered in CONFIG static block.** The new `REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_CONFIG` is never defined via `.define()` in the CONFIG static initializer. Without this registration, `config.getString(TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_CONFIG)` in the RemoteLogConfig constructor will throw a ConfigException at runtime. Add a `.define()` call following the `MESSAGE_TIMESTAMP_TYPE_CONFIG` pattern (line 304-305): `.define(TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_CONFIG, STRING, DEFAULT_REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY, in(TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_RETAIN, TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_DELETE), MEDIUM, TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_DOC)`.
- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java:182-184] **CRITICAL BUG: No default value constant defined.** There is no `DEFAULT_REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY` constant. Existing remote log configs define defaults at lines 182-184 (`DEFAULT_REMOTE_STORAGE_ENABLE`, `DEFAULT_LOCAL_RETENTION_BYTES`, `DEFAULT_LOCAL_RETENTION_MS`). You must decide and document the default value (likely "retain" for safety) and add the constant: `public static final String DEFAULT_REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY = TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_RETAIN;`.
- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java:500-510] **CRITICAL BUG: Missing public accessor method `remoteLogDisablePolicy()`.** The test in `RemoteTopicCrudTest.scala:393` calls `logBuffer.head.config.remoteLogDisablePolicy()`, but no such method exists in the outer LogConfig class. Add a public accessor following the existing pattern at lines 500-502: `public String remoteLogDisablePolicy() { return remoteLogConfig.remoteLogDisablePolicy; }`.
- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java:125-131] **Missing from RemoteLogConfig.toString():** The new `remoteLogDisablePolicy` field should be included in the `RemoteLogConfig.toString()` method for consistency with existing fields (`remoteStorageEnable`, `localRetentionMs`, `localRetentionBytes`) and to aid debugging.
- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java:191-194] **Missing from CONFIGS_WITH_NO_SERVER_DEFAULTS:** If `REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_CONFIG` has no broker-level default synonym in `ServerTopicConfigSynonyms`, add it to the `CONFIGS_WITH_NO_SERVER_DEFAULTS` set to prevent failures in `ensureNoStaticInitializationOrderDependency` test. Current set at line 191-194 contains only `REMOTE_LOG_STORAGE_ENABLE_CONFIG`, `LEADER_REPLICATION_THROTTLED_REPLICAS_CONFIG`, and `FOLLOWER_REPLICATION_THROTTLED_REPLICAS_CONFIG`.
- [core/src/test/scala/unit/kafka/log/LogConfigTest.scala:102] **Minor: Invalid value test includes "true" and "0" which are not relevant.** Since this is a STRING enum config (not BOOLEAN or numeric), "true" and "0" fail parsing for the wrong reason. Consider using more domain-relevant invalid strings like "keep", "archive", "purge" to make the test more meaningful.
v3:
SUMMARY:
This PR introduces `remote.log.disable.policy` as a topic-level config for tiered storage disablement behavior with "retain" and "delete" options. TopicConfig constants and tests are well-structured, but the LogConfig.java diff is truncated—several critical additions cannot be verified, and a test is misnamed.

POINTS:
- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java:202-206] `CONFIGS_WITH_NO_SERVER_DEFAULTS` must include the new config. The base set contains `REMOTE_LOG_STORAGE_ENABLE_CONFIG` but not `REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_CONFIG`. Since this is topic-level only (KIP-950), the new key must be added to this set. Diff is truncated—please verify this was done.
- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java:126-132] `RemoteLogConfig.toString()` is not updated. The base toString() includes only `remoteStorageEnable`, `localRetentionMs`, `localRetentionBytes`. The PR adds `remoteLogDisablePolicy` as a field but toString() must include it for debugging consistency. Diff is truncated—please verify.
- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java] `.define()` call in CONFIG static block cannot be verified. The diff is truncated after the field and constructor assignment. A `.define()` with `ConfigDef.ValidString.in(TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_RETAIN, TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_DELETE)` validator is required for validation to work.
- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java] A default value constant is required. Following `DEFAULT_REMOTE_STORAGE_ENABLE` (line 182), a constant like `DEFAULT_REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY = TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_RETAIN` should be defined, since "retain" is the sensible default per the doc string.
- [core/src/test/scala/integration/kafka/admin/RemoteTopicCrudTest.scala:160] Test method name is misleading. `testCreateRemoteTopicWithDisablePolicyRetain` is parameterized with CsvSource testing both "retain" and "delete" policies, but the name suggests only "retain" is tested. Rename to `testCreateRemoteTopicWithDisablePolicy`.
- [core/src/test/scala/unit/kafka/log/LogConfigTest.scala:102] Invalid value "not_a_number" is semantically odd for a STRING config. The case `assertPropertyInvalid(name, "not_a_number", "remove", "0", "true")` copy-pastes "not_a_number" from numeric config tests. Replace with meaningful invalid strings like "archive" or "preserve" for clarity.
v4:
SUMMARY:
This PR adds a new topic-level config `remote.log.disable.policy` for KIP-950 tiered storage disablement handling. The diff adds constants in TopicConfig.java and a field in LogConfig.java's RemoteLogConfig, but the diff is truncated and several critical pieces appear to be missing that would prevent the config from functioning at all.

POINTS:
- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java:static CONFIG block ~line 323] **CRITICAL: Missing `.define()` call for the new config.** The `RemoteLogConfig` constructor calls `config.getString(TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_CONFIG)` but the config key is never registered in the static CONFIG block. Without a `.define(TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_CONFIG, STRING, defaultValue, validator, importance, doc)` call, `AbstractConfig.getString()` will throw a `ConfigException` at runtime because the key is unrecognized. The diff shows the field/constructor change but (possibly truncated) does not show the corresponding `.define()` entry. This must be added, likely after the `REMOTE_LOG_STORAGE_ENABLE_CONFIG` definition at line 318.

- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java:202-206] **Missing from `CONFIGS_WITH_NO_SERVER_DEFAULTS`.** The PR description states this is a "topic-level only" config. The `CONFIGS_WITH_NO_SERVER_DEFAULTS` set must include `TopicConfig.REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY_CONFIG`, otherwise the `ensureNoStaticInitializationOrderDependency()` test in LogConfigTest.scala (lines 53-58) will fail — it asserts that all config names (except those in this set) have a non-null server synonym mapping. Since no broker-level default exists for this config, it must be added to this set.

- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java:182-184] **Missing default value constant.** There is no `DEFAULT_REMOTE_LOG_DISABLE_POLICY` constant defined alongside the existing `DEFAULT_REMOTE_STORAGE_ENABLE`, `DEFAULT_LOCAL_RETENTION_BYTES`, and `DEFAULT_LOCAL_RETENTION_MS`. The `.define()` call will need this default value (likely `"retain"` based on the documentation describing retain as the default behavior).

- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java:126-132] **`RemoteLogConfig.toString()` not updated.** The `toString()` method lists `remoteStorageEnable`, `localRetentionMs`, and `localRetentionBytes` but does not include the new `remoteLogDisablePolicy` field. While not a functional blocker, this should be updated for consistent debug logging. (May be in the truncated portion of the diff — please confirm.)

- [storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java] **Missing `remoteLogDisablePolicy()` public accessor.** The integration test `RemoteTopicCrudTest.scala:392` calls `logBuffer.head.config.remoteLogDisablePolicy()` but no such public method is visible in the diff. There needs to be a public getter either on `LogConfig` (delegating to `remoteLogConfig.remoteLogDisablePolicy`) or directly on `RemoteLogConfig`. Compare with existing accessors like `remoteStorageEnable()` at line 436.

- [clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/config/TopicConfig.java:105] **Documentation clarity.** The doc string says "after tiered storage disablement on a topic" — since the PR description says this is topic-level only and `REMOTE_LOG_STORAGE_ENABLE_CONFIG` itself currently cannot be disabled once enabled (see its existing doc: "You can not disable this config once it is enabled"), this new config's practical applicability may be limited in this release. Consider noting that this config is relevant for future versions where disablement is supported.
